commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the plugin inventory generator to emit compact list-style Markdown, regenerates plugin inventory/reference docs, adds the missing Parallel plugin reference page, and updates zh-CN glossary terms.

PR surface: Docs -90, Other +2. Total -88 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a docs layout PR. The PR body screenshots and inspected proof show the old table layout and the improved rendered list layout.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual maintainer handling is required because the PR is draft and has the protected maintainer label; no narrow automated repair is needed.

target.title: docs: improve plugin inventory layout
target.body:
## Summary
- Replace the generated plugin inventory table with compact Markdown rows so wrapping is local to each plugin entry instead of shared table columns.
- Keep the plugin reference landing page short and generated, with the full inventory owned by `/plugins/plugin-inventory` instead of duplicated in both places.
- Regenerate stale generated inventory artifacts, including the missing `parallel` reference target that the inventory already links to.

## User Intent
Josh asked for a KISS docs fix that makes the plugin inventory readable on normal screens, stays coherent with existing generated docs conventions, avoids a custom HTML layout unless Markdown is not viable, avoids duplicate inventory/reference content, avoids AI/frontmatter disclosure churn, and includes before/after visual proof.

## Visual Proof
Screenshots were captured from the synced `openclaw/docs` static shell at the plugin inventory section.

| Width | Before | After |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 390px | ![Before 390px](https://tmpfiles.org/dl/wewDKaMCNjUB/proof-before-mobile-390.png) | ![After 390px](https://tmpfiles.org/dl/wCwsKRMEN6Ve/proof-after-mobile-390.png) |
| 768px | ![Before 768px](https://tmpfiles.org/dl/wewDK3M6NLLO/proof-before-tablet-768.png) | ![After 768px](https://tmpfiles.org/dl/wowlKZMDNNTh/proof-after-tablet-768.png) |
| 1120px | ![Before 1120px](https://tmpfiles.org/dl/wgwQKrMLN5di/proof-before-desktop-1120.png) | ![After 1120px](https://tmpfiles.org/dl/w9wpKzMqNdoj/proof-after-desktop-1120.png) |

## Verification
- `node scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs --check`
- `node scripts/check-docs-i18n-glossary.mjs --base origin/main`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs`
- `node scripts/docs-link-audit.mjs`
- `nix shell nixpkgs#pnpm --command pnpm docs:list`
- `nix shell nixpkgs#pnpm --command pnpm dlx --config.resolution-mode=highest markdownlint-cli2 --config config/markdownlint-cli2.jsonc docs/plugins/plugin-inventory.md docs/plugins/reference.md docs/plugins/reference/parallel.md`
- `nix shell nixpkgs#oxfmt --command oxfmt --check scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs docs/plugins/plugin-inventory.md docs/plugins/reference.md docs/plugins/reference/parallel.md docs/.i18n/glossary.zh-CN.json`
- `git diff --check`
- `openclaw/docs`: `npm run docs:build:shell`
- `openclaw/docs`: `npm run docs:smoke:shell`
- In-app Browser viewport checks against the local rendered preview at 390px, 768px, and 1120px: no table, no table rows, and no horizontal overflow on the final page.
target.author: joshp123
